summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kenya Challenge punch list features. All 21 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI testing verified all major features working correctly.

fixed.issue: MongoDB aggregation error - mixed inclusion/exclusion in $project stage

fundraising_page.two_pledge_options_side_by_side: PASS - Total Pledge and Pledge Per KM visible

landing_page.become_a_sponsor_button: PASS - Button text is 'Become a Sponsor'

leaderboard_page.clickable_walker_names: PASS - Walker names are links to /fundraise/{user_id}

admin_page.user_deletion: PASS - Delete buttons visible for non-admin users, admin protected

team_page.invite_section: PASS - Invite link with Copy button visible
team_page.email_invite_form: PASS - Name/Email fields with Send Invites button

onboarding_page.default_supporter_rows: PASS - 3 default empty rows in supporters state

dashboard_page.profile_picture_upload: PASS - Camera icon on hover, upload button with data-testid
